sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29904" key="e(bdomhkontakaiekatontaplasi/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑβδομηκοντακαιεκᾰτονταπλᾰσίων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">170</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n29904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as great</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.104</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
